title: VERKENNERSGIDS VOOR THEMATISCHE NETWERKEN
subtitle: HOE THEMATISCHE NETWERKEN ONTWERPEN EN UITVOEREN OM DE BETROKKENHEID EN DE IMPACT VAN DE GEBRUIKERS TE MAXIMALISEREN
description: A guide for coordinators and consortium members on designing and implementing thematic networks to maximize user engagement and impact under the Horizon 2020 programme. It provides best practices, methodologies and frameworks for multi-actor partnerships and knowledge exchange throughout the lifecycle of thematic networks.
